projectDescription: Observability, tracing, and monitoring SDK for AI products with automatic integrations for OpenAI, Vercel AI SDK, and LangChain/LangGraph.
keyFeatures: Span-based tracing with AsyncLocalStorage context management
Automatic integrations for OpenAI, Vercel AI SDK, and LangChain/LangGraph
Decorator and function wrapper patterns for easy instrumentation
Signals API for boolean, numerical, and string metrics
Content-addressed prompt management with version control
Streaming support with latency and throughput metrics
Automatic token usage tracking and cost monitoring
Works in Node.js 18+, Bun, and browser environments
Dual ESM/CJS output with full TypeScript support
publicApiSurface: init() - Initialize the SDK with configuration
span() - Decorator for automatic tracing
withSpan() - Context manager for manual tracing
tracer - Singleton tracer instance
wrap() - Auto-detect and wrap OpenAI or Vercel AI clients
wrapOpenAI() - Wrap OpenAI client for automatic tracing
wrapVercelAI() - Wrap Vercel AI SDK for automatic tracing
ZeroEvalCallbackHandler - LangChain callback handler
setGlobalCallbackHandler() - Set global LangChain handler
sendSignal() - Send signal to specific entity
sendBulkSignals() - Send multiple signals in bulk
sendTraceSignal() - Send signal to current trace
sendSessionSignal() - Send signal to current session
sendSpanSignal() - Send signal to current span
getEntitySignals() - Retrieve signals for an entity
prompt() - Version-aware prompt management
sendFeedback() - Send feedback on LLM completions
getCurrentSpan() - Get current span from context
getCurrentTrace() - Get current trace ID
getCurrentSession() - Get current session ID
setTag() - Add tags to current span
